title: Fix first-login password change redirect loop
description:
After setting a new password on first login, PipeSync no longer bounces between login and the dashboard. The backend now mirrors password changes to Postgres even when Wasabi is the primary write path, so GET /session returns mustChangePassword:false immediately. Login re-fetches /session before redirecting instead of reusing stale pending-user state.

Who is affected: OVH private server on deploy. SaaS when Mike applies the platform version in releases.html.
changeLog: Mirror change-password to Postgres after Wasabi write so /session clears mustChangePassword.
Login re-fetches /session and clears mustChangePassword client state before dashboard redirect.
Cache bust pwloop1 on login, PipeSync boot, and mobile shell.
